01 FLIGHT MANIFESTO

An ultra-low-cost airline where everything goes wrong
all at once.

You play the crew of Banana Airlines, an airline whose plane falls apart mid-flight. The goal is to get from A to B maximizing passenger happiness while juggling constant emergencies, technical failures, and absurd threats.

Every passenger has a visible happiness meter reacting in real time. Prolonged chaos, impacts, and rough landings drag the overall mood down. The humor lives in the absurd: patch the fuselage with wood and nails, use an umbrella as a lightning rod, hang outside the plane on a rope to fix the engine mid-air.

+ + + + FLIGHT MANUAL · P. 047 APPROVEDBY NO ONE “ Repair a door with planks while a passenger in front of the hole asks if the coffee comes with plant-based milk. ” § 4.2 · IN-FLIGHT REPAIR PROTOCOL
02 GAMEPLAY LOOP

Four pillars feeding back into a constant disaster.

01— PILLAR

SERVE

Food, water, oxygen masks, seat changes, lollipops to calm babies and passengers hit by luggage.

  • Orders
  • Complaints
  • Lollipops
02— PILLAR

REPAIR

Doors with wood, engines while dangling from a rope outside the plane, clogged toilets with the plunger, wings patched with tape.

  • Wood
  • Engine
  • Plunger
03— PILLAR

DEFEND

Luggage bombs + puzzle, alien invasion, missiles from a war zone. Disarm with a code, dodge, or throw it out the door.

  • Bombs
  • Aliens
  • Eject
04— PILLAR

FLY

Someone takes the controls. Dodge missiles, fly through storms, respond to TERRAIN PULL UP, stick a precision landing.

  • Land
  • Storm
  • Pilot
03 PASSENGERS

The most relentless enemy is sitting in economy class.

METER · HAPPINESS

Real-time happiness

Each passenger displays their state. Everything adds or subtracts:

  • + Serve orders quickly
  • + Deliver mask during turbulence
  • + Lollipop to a crying baby
  • − Hits from luggage or objects
  • − Rough landing
  • − Watching someone get sucked out the door
12A

Crying baby

Spreads unease. Calmed with a lollipop.

07F

Smelly passenger

Annoys the neighbors. Solution: seat change.

22C

Door suction

Door torn off, seat about to be sucked out. Move them now.

14B

Hit by luggage

Gets angry. Lollipop or quick apology before they lose happiness.

19D

Infected passenger

The alien transforms them progressively. Antidote or door.

01A

Panicking passenger

Active emergency: screams and spreads panic to neighbors. Calm them or contain the others.

04 EVENTS & THREATS

Everything that can go wrong, goes wrong in a chain.

ALT-01
TIER 1 → 3

Turbulence

Shakes, throws objects, knocks the player off-axis. At high tier it rips doors off and can break an engine.

T1 · shakesT2 · door fliesT3 · breaks engine
ELX-02
ELECTRICITY

Storm / Turbostorm

Lightning breaks the engine, walls, kills the lights. Lightning-rod umbrella on the wing as absurd defense.

⚡ Blackout⚡ Engine⚡ Fuselage
WAR-03
COMBAT

War zone

Missiles seek the plane. The pilot dodges; if they hit, doors or engines break. Everyone else repairs.

DodgeRepairSurvive
EMR-04
PUZZLE + CODE

Bomb suitcase

You open a bag and find a bomb puzzle. The disarm code is in another suitcase. T1: throw it out or solve. T2: cut chains with pliers. T3: welded shut, code split across two bags.

PuzzleCodeDouble manual
BIO-05
BIOHAZARD

Alien invasion

Alien stuck to a window. If it gets in, it infects. Progresses until the passenger attacks others. Antidote or eject.

PreventCureEject
BUG-06
FACE

Bug suitcase

Sticks to a player's face: vision blocked, erratic movement, alien voice. A teammate hits it off with a bat.

BlindedErraticRescue
PWR-07
FAULT

Electrical failure

Lights flicker, passengers get irritated, doors open and close on their own. Fuse + hold E.

LightsDoorsPanic
GPW-08
PROXIMITY

TERRAIN PULL UP

Cabin alarm. Someone runs to the controls and lifts the plane before it hits the ground.

AlarmRunClimb
WC-09
RESTROOM

Clogged bathroom

A passenger clogged the toilet. Unclog with the plunger. If the plane shakes, it splashes and stains you.

PlungerTimingSplash
05 CABIN INVENTORY

Absurd tools for serious problems.

ITEM-001COMMON

Food cart

Water, snacks, lollipops — the service ops hub.

ITEM-002COMMON

Oxygen masks

Hand them out during turbulence or depressurization.

ITEM-003EPIC

Bomb-defuse kit

Disarms or buys time on explosive luggage.

ITEM-004COMMON

Wood + nails

From the suitcases. Patches doors, windows, wings.

ITEM-005RARE

Antidote

Cures the alien infection before it goes total.

ITEM-006EPIC

Lightning-rod umbrella

Place it on the wing. Open it early and you go flying.

ITEM-007COMMON

Plunger

Unclogs the toilet. Watch the splash in turbulence.

ITEM-008RARE

Pliers

Cut bomb chains at Tier 2.

ITEM-009COMMON

Duct tape

Patches the punctured wing while fuel leaks out.

ITEM-010RARE

Rope / harness

You go out the door and fix the engine mid-air.

ITEM-011COMMON

Fuses

Restore the electrical system by holding E.

ITEM-012LEGENDARY

Lollipop

The universal emotional fix. Babies, injured, angry.

06 PRODUCTION ROADMAP

From playable demo to extended chaos.

SCOPE 1 · MUST HAVE

Primera versión jugable

ETA · Q3 2026 9 CORE · 13 NICE IN FLIGHT
PRE ALPHA BETA RC GOLD
  • Passengers with happiness meter + needs (food, water, masks, special requests)
  • Start / arrival with a cabin progress slider
  • Cart with water, snacks, lollipops — masks — bomb kit
  • Button to open / close doors (eject threats or objects)
  • Bomb suitcase: internal puzzle + code in another bag, grabbable or fixed to a surface
  • Turbulence (upsets passengers, breaks windows)
  • Electric storm (breaks engine or doors)
  • War zone with missiles to dodge
  • Fix doors with wood / fix the engine while hanging from a rope
Nice to have: Lightning-rod umbrellaAlien suitcaseAntidote Alien invasionElectrical failureClogged bathroom Landing with meterAirport lobby
Extras: Alien attack Infection meme (Goo goo ga ga)Route-themed passengers Fuel loss
SCOPE 2 · MUST HAVE

Pulido y profundidad

ETA · Q1 2027 9 CORE · 3 NICE PRE-BOARDING
PRE ALPHA BETA RC GOLD
  • Physics-based characters: funny animations, knockouts with objects, crouch, free rope
  • Improved plane: stable props, better rotation feedback, no confusing boundaries
  • Directional voice chat with modulation and an inside/outside-cabin difference
  • Partial Steam integration: invite friends, party, airport lobby
  • Bomb suitcases scaled to Tier 1-2-3 (chain → pliers → welded with double manual)
  • Bug suitcase stuck to your face + rescue with a bat
  • Turbostorm: combo of lightning, turbulence, and blackout
  • Tier 1-3 turbulence scaled (shakes → doors fly → breaks engine)
  • Elevated terrain with TERRAIN PULL UP alarm
Nice to have: Precision-landing minigameLightning-rod umbrella
Extras: Punctured wing with fuel + duct tape
07 CAST · CREW

The four flight crew.

Four playable characters, each with their role in the chaos. Iconic passengers and route-themed skins will be defined in the next iteration.

C-01 ▸
CAPI Pilot · runs the cabin
C-02 ▸
RUBI Flight attendant · in-flight service
C-03 ▸
PISTACHO Mechanic · fixes engines
C-04 ▸
MOCHA Flight attendant · absurd PR
